requirements.requirement: Parent run can spawn or retain child trajectory links.
requirements.coverage: delegation snapshot reads AgentState.child_session_ids and parent playbook active child ids.

requirements.requirement: Child has independent steps, policy/evidence, and cleanup state.
requirements.coverage: snapshot reads child AgentState, trajectory presence, brain presence, worker assignment, worker result, and harness worker checkpoint presence.

requirements.requirement: Parent work lane shows child summary, not raw child payloads.
requirements.coverage: product_lane entries use role/status/handoff preview with detail_visibility=runs_tracing; unit proof rejects raw child output in product summary.

requirements.requirement: Failed child returns typed error/evidence to parent model loop.
requirements.coverage: failed_child_feedback includes child id, status, error_class, feedback preview, and tracing visibility.

requirements.requirement: Browser subagent sessions are managed live artifacts.
requirements.coverage: existing browser_subagent path remains implementation source; live artifact proof deferred to Stage 8/integrated GUI soak.

requirements.requirement: Kill/restart can recover parent/child linkage from durable state.
requirements.coverage: inspect_thread derives delegation state from persisted state only; live restart proof remains required.
